data.text: P04/04 A FELISIAN WORLD . AT 15.60 THERE WAS AN ICY MOUNTAINSIDE
WITH A LONG CANYON GOING DOWNHILL, WHICH I CHOSE TO NOT GET
INVOLVED IN, BUT HEADED DOWNHILL TO A BEACH AREA, WHERE THE CANYON
EXITS, AT SOME DISTANCE THERE IS ANOTHER LARGE ROUND HILL LIKE ON
ON GREGIS. 340.11 WAS DOWNHILL SLOPING AND BARREN, AN OBJECT SEEN
WHILE LANDING TURNED OUT TO BE A MULTIFACETED BOULDER OF THE TYPE
ON QUARTZ WORLDS. AT 325.59 THE LANDING WAS IN SOME GROUND THAT WAS
BLOCKLIKE RATHER THAN HILLY IN MOST DIRECTIONS, BUT ONE LED TO A
DOWNHILL BEACH SLOPE, WHERE AN OBJECT SPOTTED WAS A POINTY FACETED
BOULDER EXACTLY LIKE ON QUARTZ WORLDS SITTING ON THE HILSIDE.
I WOULD 'HATE' TO SURMISE THE FELISIAN WORLDS IN THIS SYSTEM WERE
NOT HERE BUT FOR INTERVENTION BY THE ANCIENTS. DOMES? PR0 0.163.
